title: Venezuela Live Updates: Death Toll Rises as Rescuers Mount Frantic Search for Quake Survivors
summary_full: The 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes left at least 164 dead and hundreds missing, the authorities said. The full scale of the damage was still becoming clear.
summary_public: The 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes left at least 164 dead and hundreds missing, the authorities said. The full scale of the damage was still becoming clear.
